highlights: OpenAI is pushing the boundaries of AI capabilities with previews of next-generation models like GPT-5.6 Sol, emphasizing advancements in coding, science, and cybersecurity, alongside new benchmarks for scientific AI.

Significant strides are being made in AI infrastructure, including the introduction of custom LLM-optimized inference chips and AI-powered security tools, vital for scalable and secure deployment of advanced AI systems.

The burgeoning field of AI agents is seeing rapid development, with new research exploring their transformative impact on work and the introduction of specialized benchmarks and security considerations for enterprise adoption.

agents.title: How agents are transforming work
agents.summary: OpenAI research demonstrates how AI agents are fundamentally changing work processes by enabling longer, more complex tasks, significantly boosting productivity across various roles and industries.

agents.title: ScarfBench: Benchmarking AI Agents for Enterprise Java Framework Migration
agents.summary: IBM Research introduces a new benchmark, ScarfBench, specifically designed to evaluate AI agents' performance in complex enterprise tasks like migrating Java frameworks, aiding in the development of more robust business automation solutions.

agents.title: MosaicLeaks: Can your research agent keep a secret?
agents.summary: This research from ServiceNow highlights critical security and privacy challenges with AI agents, urging developers to consider data leakage risks and implement robust safeguards when building agentic systems.

models.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
models.summary: OpenAI offers a preview of GPT-5.6 Sol, a new flagship model boasting enhanced capabilities in critical areas like coding, science, and cybersecurity, coupled with an advanced safety stack, setting new performance benchmarks.

models.title: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
models.summary: OpenAI unveils GeneBench-Pro, a novel benchmark designed to rigorously test AI model performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets, fostering innovation in specialized AI applications.

models.title: Hugging Face and Cerebras bring Gemma 4 to real-time voice AI
models.summary: Hugging Face partners with Cerebras to optimize and deploy Gemma 4 for real-time voice AI applications, showcasing how specialized hardware and models can deliver high-performance solutions for demanding use cases.

tools.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
tools.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce 'Jalapeño,' a custom AI chip specifically engineered for LLM inference, promising significant improvements in performance, efficiency, and scalability for deploying large language models.

tools.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
tools.summary: OpenAI launches new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, empowering organizations to leverage AI for discovering, validating, and patching software vulnerabilities at an unprecedented scale.

tools.title: Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command
tools.summary: Hugging Face simplifies the deployment of vLLM servers on its Jobs platform, enabling developers to quickly set up and scale high-throughput inference for large language models with a single command.

companies.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
companies.summary: HP Inc. is expanding its strategic partnership with OpenAI, integrating AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations to drive innovation and efficiency at a corporate scale.

companies.title: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
companies.summary: New OpenAI Signals data reveals accelerated global adoption of ChatGPT, demonstrating increasing user engagement, exploration of diverse capabilities, and robust growth across various regions and languages.

companies.title: Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity
companies.summary: An OpenAI report analyzes how AI is poised to transform the European job market, identifying occupations likely to undergo automation, experience growth, or require workflow adaptation, offering strategic insights for workforce planning.

learning.title: Codex-maxxing for long-running work
learning.summary: This article provides a practical guide on leveraging OpenAI's Codex to maintain context and efficiently manage complex, long-running projects, enabling developers to push the boundaries of AI-assisted productivity.

learning.title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
learning.summary: A Google AI expert explains the 'full-stack' approach to AI development, offering foundational knowledge essential for understanding how to integrate and build comprehensive AI solutions from infrastructure to application.

learning.title: Beyond LoRA: Can you beat the most popular fine-tuning technique?
learning.summary: This guide delves into advanced fine-tuning methods beyond the popular LoRA technique, providing insights and experiments for developers aiming to achieve superior model performance and efficiency in specialized tasks.
